utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final package: 
1. destination – fully specified (Prague, Czech Republic) ✅
2. travel_dates – fully specified (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09) ✅
3. transportation – includes flight details and cost (€100) ✅
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, duration, cost per night, and total cost (€220) ✅
5. activities – includes specified activities and total cost (€45) ✅
6. additional_services – included but empty; not fully specified (should have details or explicitly state none needed, but empty array may count as not detailed) ❌
7. total_budget – includes total estimated cost, remaining budget, and budget limit (fully specified) ✅
Thus, 6 items are covered out of 7.
